s: An Online-Multiplayer game. Collect so much more burgers as you can.
d: This is an Online-Multiplayer game where you will need to collect so much more burgers 🍔🍔🍔 as you can. Here will won the who one, who collect more burgers than others. You have 30 seconds to do that ⏳. The game doesn't need an Anti-Cheat system because it has the architecture that doesn't let anybody to cheat.
